evidence.scope: files=25 surface=frontend+backend+common+task-artifacts bounded to one organization-onboarding subsystem
evidence.behavior: one bounded workflow set: auth entry, organization creation, invite acceptance, and organization landing
evidence.uncertainty: known implementation pattern with moderate integration risk across auth, persistence, and invite routing
evidence.verification: checks=lint,build,test with unit, integration, and frontend flow coverage
evidence.guardrails: schema and API changes are required; dependencies may expand; feature work remains repo-local and reversible through explicit verification
